requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — Lighting Equipment （NC/IEC CISPR 15 via ANOR）
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——照明设备（经 ANOR 采用的 NC/IEC CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——照明設備（經 ANOR 採用的 NC/IEC CISPR 15）

summary.en: Cameroon does not operate a stand-alone EMC Directive in the EU sense. Electromagnetic emission requirements for lighting equipment are addressed through ANOR's adoption of the international IEC/CISPR base — CISPR 15 （Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment）, adopted as a Norme Camerounaise where applicable — within the conformity assessment / import inspection programme rather than as a horizontal, market-wide CE-style EMC obligation. Where a luminaire falls in the regulated scope, the ANOR conformity assessment may require radio-disturbance （conducted and radiated emission） evidence against the adopted CISPR 15-based NC. Documentation should be in French and an in-country importer is normally required. Note: enforcement of EMC emission limits in Cameroon is less prescriptive and less uniformly applied than the EU EMC Directive regime; verify the current adopted NC and the scope of EMC requirements in the conformity programme with ANOR.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆不像欧盟那样实行独立的 EMC 指令。照明设备的电磁发射要求通过 ANOR 采用国际 IEC/CISPR 基础——在适用时将 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值与测量方法）采用为喀麦隆标准——并纳入合格评定/进口检验计划，而非作为横向、覆盖全市场的 CE 式 EMC 义务。当灯具属于受管制范围时，ANOR 合格评定可能要求依据所采用的基于 CISPR 15 的 NC 提供无线电骚扰（传导与辐射发射）证据。文件应为法语，通常须有在地进口商。注意：喀麦隆对 EMC 发射限值的执行不如欧盟 EMC 指令制度具规定性且适用不够统一；请向 ANOR 核实现行采用的 NC 及合格评定计划中 EMC 要求的范围。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆不像歐盟那樣實行獨立的 EMC 指令。照明設備的電磁發射要求通過 ANOR 採用國際 IEC/CISPR 基礎——在適用時將 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值與測量方法）採用為喀麥隆標準——並納入合格評定/進口檢驗計劃，而非作為橫向、覆蓋全市場的 CE 式 EMC 義務。當燈具屬於受管制範圍時，ANOR 合格評定可能要求依據所採用的基於 CISPR 15 的 NC 提供無線電騷擾（傳導與輻射發射）證據。文件應為法語，通常須有在地進口商。注意：喀麥隆對 EMC 發射限值的執行不如歐盟 EMC 指令制度具規定性且適用不夠統一；請向 ANOR 核實現行採用的 NC 及合格評定計劃中 EMC 要求的範圍。

standards_or_laws: ANOR conformity assessment / import inspection programme （Cameroon）
NC/IEC CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment （adopted as Norme Camerounaise where applicable）

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 （Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment）, technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification for relevant categories, with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Because both the Cameroon-adopted NC and the Chinese GB derive from CISPR 15, the emission limits themselves are broadly the same.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具，相关类别须符合 GB 17743，作为 CCC 认证的组成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。由于喀麦隆采用的 NC 与中国 GB 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值本身基本相同。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具，相關類別須符合 GB 17743，作為 CCC 認證的組成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。由於喀麥隆採用的 NC 與中國 GB 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值本身基本相同。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment （aligned with CISPR 15）

gap.en: Because both the Cameroon-adopted NC and China's GB 17743 derive from CISPR 15, the emission limits are essentially the same and a product meeting GB 17743 will generally meet the technical limits adopted in Cameroon. The differences are structural and procedural: （1） Cameroon has no horizontal CE-style EMC Directive — EMC emission evidence is requested （where applicable） inside the ANOR conformity assessment / import inspection, not as a separate market-wide obligation, and enforcement is less uniform than in the EU; （2） a Chinese CCC EMC report is not automatically an ANOR conformity document — an IEC/CISPR-based test report acceptable to the ANOR programme is the practical route; （3） French documentation is expected. Verify with ANOR whether and how EMC emission evidence is currently required for the specific luminaire category before shipment.
gap.zh: 由于喀麦隆采用的 NC 与中国 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本相同，符合 GB 17743 的产品通常也能满足喀麦隆采用的技术限值。差异属结构性与程序性：（1）喀麦隆没有横向 CE 式 EMC 指令——EMC 发射证据（在适用时）于 ANOR 合格评定/进口检验内部提出，而非作为单独的全市场义务，且执行不如欧盟统一；（2）中国 CCC EMC 报告不自动成为 ANOR 合格文件——实际路径是采用 ANOR 计划可接受的基于 IEC/CISPR 的检测报告；（3）须提供法语文件。出货前请向 ANOR 核实具体灯具类别当前是否及如何要求 EMC 发射证据。
gap.zht: 由於喀麥隆採用的 NC 與中國 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本相同，符合 GB 17743 的產品通常也能滿足喀麥隆採用的技術限值。差異屬結構性與程序性：（1）喀麥隆沒有橫向 CE 式 EMC 指令——EMC 發射證據（在適用時）於 ANOR 合格評定/進口檢驗內部提出，而非作為單獨的全市場義務，且執行不如歐盟統一；（2）中國 CCC EMC 報告不自動成為 ANOR 合格文件——實際路徑是採用 ANOR 計劃可接受的基於 IEC/CISPR 的檢測報告；（3）須提供法語文件。出貨前請向 ANOR 核實具體燈具類別當前是否及如何要求 EMC 發射證據。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional （within conformity programme） — no horizontal CE-style EMC Directive; CISPR 15-based emission evidence may be required inside ANOR conformity assessment / import inspection for regulated luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for relevant luminaire categories in China

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualite （Cameroon）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cameroon has no EU-style horizontal EMC Directive; lighting EMC emission requirements are handled through ANOR's adoption of CISPR 15 as a Norme Camerounaise inside the conformity assessment / import inspection programme, with less uniform enforcement than the EU. Emission limits match China's GB 17743 （both CISPR 15-based）, so the technical burden largely transfers, but a Chinese CCC EMC report is not itself an ANOR conformity document — an IEC/CISPR-based report acceptable to ANOR is the practical route, with French documentation. Confirm current EMC scope for the product category with ANOR before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆没有欧盟式横向 EMC 指令；照明 EMC 发射要求通过 ANOR 将 CISPR 15 采用为喀麦隆标准并纳入合格评定/进口检验计划处理，执行不如欧盟统一。发射限值与中国 GB 17743 一致（均基于 CISPR 15），技术负担大体可沿用，但中国 CCC EMC 报告本身并非 ANOR 合格文件——实际路径是采用 ANOR 可接受的基于 IEC/CISPR 的报告，并提供法语文件。出货前请向 ANOR 确认该产品类别当前的 EMC 范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆沒有歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令；照明 EMC 發射要求通過 ANOR 將 CISPR 15 採用為喀麥隆標準並納入合格評定/進口檢驗計劃處理，執行不如歐盟統一。發射限值與中國 GB 17743 一致（均基於 CISPR 15），技術負擔大體可沿用，但中國 CCC EMC 報告本身並非 ANOR 合格文件——實際路徑是採用 ANOR 可接受的基於 IEC/CISPR 的報告，並提供法語文件。出貨前請向 ANOR 確認該產品類別當前的 EMC 範圍。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Approval for Smart / Wireless Luminaires （ART type approval）
requirement_topic.zh: 智能/无线灯具的无线电核准（ART 型号核准）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能/無線燈具的無線電核准（ART 型號核准）

summary.en: Smart LED luminaires with wireless functionality （Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, etc.） are subject to radio regulation by ART （Agence de Regulation des Telecommunications）, Cameroon's telecommunications regulator. Radio transmitting equipment generally requires ART type approval / homologation before it can be lawfully imported, sold, or operated in Cameroon, in addition to the ANOR electrical-safety conformity covering the luminaire itself. This is the Cameroon analogue of the radio-equipment approval step （equivalent in purpose to the EU Radio Equipment Directive for wireless products）. Applications are typically filed by the in-country importer/representative and reference the radio test evidence （IEC/ETSI-type RF and radio-parameter reports）. French documentation is expected. Non-wireless （mains-only） luminaires do not trigger the ART step.
summary.zh: 具备无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 等）的智能 LED 灯具受喀麦隆电信监管机构 ART（电信监管署）的无线电管理。无线发射设备通常须在合法进口、销售或使用前取得 ART 型号核准/认证（homologation），此外灯具本身仍须取得涵盖电气安全的 ANOR 合格评定。这是喀麦隆对应的无线电设备核准环节（目的上等同于欧盟针对无线产品的无线电设备指令）。申请通常由在地进口商/代表提交，并引用无线电检测证据（IEC/ETSI 类射频与无线电参数报告）。须提供法语文件。非无线（仅市电）灯具不触发 ART 环节。
summary.zht: 具備無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 等）的智能 LED 燈具受喀麥隆電信監管機構 ART（電信監管署）的無線電管理。無線發射設備通常須在合法進口、銷售或使用前取得 ART 型號核准/認證（homologation），此外燈具本身仍須取得涵蓋電氣安全的 ANOR 合格評定。這是喀麥隆對應的無線電設備核准環節（目的上等同於歐盟針對無線產品的無線電設備指令）。申請通常由在地進口商/代表提交，並引用無線電檢測證據（IEC/ETSI 類射頻與無線電參數報告）。須提供法語文件。非無線（僅市電）燈具不觸發 ART 環節。

standards_or_laws: ART （Agence de Regulation des Telecommunications） — Cameroon radio equipment type approval / homologation
Cameroon telecommunications law — radio transmitting equipment approval regime

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC （State Radio Regulation Commission） type approval for the radio module, in addition to any applicable CCC for the luminaire. SRRC approval covers permitted frequency bands, transmit power, and spurious emissions for equipment used in China. SRRC type approval is a domestic Chinese authorization and is not recognized by ART — a separate Cameroon ART homologation is required for the same wireless product.
summary.zh: 在中国，具备无线功能的灯具须为无线模块取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，此外灯具还须取得任何适用的 CCC。SRRC 核准涵盖在中国使用设备的许可频段、发射功率及杂散发射。SRRC 型号核准是中国国内授权，不被 ART 认可——同一无线产品须另行取得喀麦隆 ART 认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，具備無線功能的燈具須為無線模組取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，此外燈具還須取得任何適用的 CCC。SRRC 核准涵蓋在中國使用設備的許可頻段、發射功率及雜散發射。SRRC 型號核准是中國國內授權，不被 ART 認可——同一無線產品須另行取得喀麥隆 ART 認證。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled equipment in China （State Radio Regulation Commission）

gap.en: Both Cameroon （ART） and China （SRRC） require radio type approval for wireless products, so the existence of an approval obligation is parallel — but the approvals are not mutually recognized. A Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy ART, and the permitted frequency bands and power limits in Cameroon are set by Cameroon's national frequency allocation, which can differ from China's. For export, the manufacturer/importer must: （1） obtain ART homologation for the radio module before import/sale; （2） confirm the wireless feature operates within Cameroon's authorized bands; （3） file via an in-country importer/representative with radio test evidence and French documentation. Non-wireless luminaires avoid this step entirely. Verify the current ART application procedure and the frequency-band rules before shipment.
gap.zh: 喀麦隆（ART）与中国（SRRC）均要求无线产品取得无线电型号核准，故核准义务的存在是并行的——但两者不互认。中国 SRRC 核准不满足 ART，且喀麦隆许可的频段与功率限值由喀麦隆国家频率分配确定，可能与中国不同。出口时，制造商/进口商须：（1）在进口/销售前为无线模块取得 ART 认证；（2）确认无线功能在喀麦隆授权频段内运行；（3）经在地进口商/代表提交无线电检测证据及法语文件。非无线灯具完全避开此环节。出货前请核实现行 ART 申请程序及频段规则。
gap.zht: 喀麥隆（ART）與中國（SRRC）均要求無線產品取得無線電型號核准，故核准義務的存在是並行的——但兩者不互認。中國 SRRC 核准不滿足 ART，且喀麥隆許可的頻段與功率限值由喀麥隆國家頻率分配確定，可能與中國不同。出口時，製造商/進口商須：（1）在進口/銷售前為無線模組取得 ART 認證；（2）確認無線功能在喀麥隆授權頻段內運行；（3）經在地進口商/代表提交無線電檢測證據及法語文件。非無線燈具完全避開此環節。出貨前請核實現行 ART 申請程序及頻段規則。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless products — ART type approval / homologation required before import, sale, or operation of wireless-enabled luminaires; not triggered by mains-only luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless products — SRRC type approval required for the radio module of wireless-enabled equipment in China

source.publisher: ART — Agence de Regulation des Telecommunications （Cameroon）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart/wireless LED luminaires entering Cameroon require ART radio type approval / homologation in addition to ANOR electrical-safety conformity. Both Cameroon （ART） and China （SRRC） impose a radio-approval duty, but they are not mutually recognized — an SRRC approval does not satisfy ART, and Cameroon's authorized bands/power limits may differ. Apply for ART homologation via an in-country importer with radio test evidence and French documentation; mains-only luminaires do not trigger this step. Verify the current ART procedure and frequency rules before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入喀麦隆的智能/无线 LED 灯具除 ANOR 电气安全合格评定外，还须取得 ART 无线电型号核准/认证。喀麦隆（ART）与中国（SRRC）均设无线电核准义务，但两者不互认——SRRC 核准不满足 ART，且喀麦隆授权频段/功率限值可能不同。须经在地进口商凭无线电检测证据及法语文件申请 ART 认证；仅市电灯具不触发此环节。出货前请核实现行 ART 程序及频率规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入喀麥隆的智能/無線 LED 燈具除 ANOR 電氣安全合格評定外，還須取得 ART 無線電型號核准/認證。喀麥隆（ART）與中國（SRRC）均設無線電核准義務，但兩者不互認——SRRC 核准不滿足 ART，且喀麥隆授權頻段/功率限值可能不同。須經在地進口商憑無線電檢測證據及法語文件申請 ART 認證；僅市電燈具不觸發此環節。出貨前請核實現行 ART 程序及頻率規則。
